replies.msg:
He probably didn’t think he‘d have such a good start in the season, he may have dreamed about it and thought it could be so great. Lucas Torreira has conquered everyone’s heart at Arsenal in a few months: fans, teammates, club, and Unai Emery. The coach who wanted him and convinced him to move to England can‘t put his Uruguayan midfielder on the bench anymore.

At 22, he’s already played 21 games between league and cups, scored 2 goals, made 2 assists in Premier League and has the love of the fans and the trust of his coach. He‘s talked about his first months in England to Arsenal’s official TV:

”After the season ended at Sampdoria, I had a lot of offers from different clubs. A lot of teams tried to get me but I thought I‘d stay in Italy since most of these teams were in Serie A and I never imagined playing in England. Before I left for the World Cup in Russia, I got a call from Emery that surprised me. I knew I deserved it for all the things and the work I’ve done, but it still surprised me. That phone call made me happy“.

”It‘s not been easy to learn the language and communicate with everyone but I’m quite lucky regarding that aspect too: the coach and the staff are Spanish so it makes my life easier as they explain things to me in Spanish. Adaptation to the new league? It‘s not easy, the intensity and the quality of the game is really different from Serie A. I also play more here. I only was involved in two competitions in Italy, in Coppa Italia and Serie A, but there are four competitions to play here“.

以小本拍攝嘅日本電影《屍殺片場》靠口碑成為賣座電影，數月來於當地掃走不少影壇獎項，更掀起一片熱潮及引發社會現象。
上田慎一郎執導嘅《屍殺片場》已在本月火速推出DVD及藍光碟，勢估唔到AV商比原裝版行快一步，日前已有AV版嘅《屍殺片場》於當地上架，更效法原裝版以一Take過拍攝當中一場65分鐘場面，連封面都抄到足。
另外，《屍殺片場》男星大澤真一郎同男主角濱津隆之近日再結片緣，於長野拍攝新片《透子的世界》，係兩人相隔一年半再度合作。

美國費城（Philadelphia）電視台WPVI周二（11日）播出約舒亞的母親梅根（Megan Trump）以及繼父貝爾托（Bobby Berto）的訪問，梅根透露兒子約舒亞與特朗普並無血緣關係，但自從特朗普競選美國總統後，約舒亞在學校就開始被欺負。

梅根說：「他們咒罵他，叫他傻仔，說他愚蠢。」約舒亞更曾因此停學，改為在家接受教育。

至今年約舒亞升上塔利中學（Talley Middle School），這間中學的老師已盡量不直呼他的姓氏，但情況卻未有改善。梅根表示，約舒亞經常為此難過，並且討厭自己以及特朗普這個姓氏。

塔利中學校長邁耶（Mark Mayer）近日與梅根和貝爾托會面後已就事件展開調查，並懲罰了5名學生。校方亦同意立即在學校系統裏，把約舒亞的姓氏改為繼父的姓氏貝爾托（Berto）。
